title: ornithogalum bifoliatum
intro: Ornithogalum bifoliatum, also known as the two-leafed starflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its alkaloid compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum bifoliatum, including infusions and extracts, are used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
